articles.title: McLaren Racing Taps Tezos to Launch NFT Platform
articles.description: McLaren Racing has partnered with Tezos to create a new NFT platform aimed at enhancing fan engagement and digital collectibles. This collaboration will allow fans to purchase, trade, and showcase unique digital assets related to the racing team, leveraging Tezos’ blockchain technology for secure transactions and authenticity.
